title: Helios Settings Activation Evidence
description: Evidence produced by Apply-AkashicClaudeHooks.ps1 when activating or verifying Helios hook entries in Claude settings.

settings_path.description: Path to the Claude settings.json that was modified.

backup_path.description: Path to the pre-activation backup. Null if no backup was created.

helios_gate_root.description: Path to the Helios .command-gate directory the hooks point to.

hook_commands.description: The exact hook commands written to settings.

hooks_added.description: Hook points that were newly added.

hooks_already_present.description: Hook points that were already configured.

status.description: ACTIVATED if hooks were written, ALREADY_ACTIVE if no changes needed.
